task.name: customer makes notice at the secretarial office
secretarial worker inquires the patient data
secretarial worker put through the doctor to the nursing officer
nursing officer makes a full inquiry into the patient's state
nursing officer records information on registration form
nursing officer hands form in at the secretarial office
secretarial office stores information in the information system
secretarial office prints the form's information
secretarial office creates a patient file
secretarial office stores registration form and the print in the patient file
secretarial office produces two registration cards
secretarial office assigns new patients to team members
secretarial office records assignments on an assignment list
team members determine whether the medical file of the patient is required
team members add information to assignment list
secretarial office stores the assignments in the information system
secretarial office passes the produced registration cards
secretarial office prepares a letter to the family doctor
secretarial office sends a letter to the family doctor
secretarial receives a copy of a medical file
secretarial office informs the intaker
secretarial office adds the copy to the patient file
first intaker plans a meeting with the patient
first intaker examines the patient
first intaker registers additional observations in notes
first intaker puts a copy of notes in the patient's file
first intaker adds standard checklist to the patient's file
secretarial office types out the tapes
secretarial office adds the info to the patient file
secretarial office puts the patient on the list of patients
secretarial office provides the team-leader with a list of these patients
team members formulate a treatment plan for patients
team members have staff meeting
secretarial office adds new patient on the list of new notices
second intaker plans the first meeting
